ab: kosi’a ka, amwa kake tecekecekelane swapepeale twamane.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven't seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: tawmo ko cengelini koa ka pakane nakoa na si-kwa, la pa’ongolo nakoa na ’ocya.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: doko’ini ki tawmo ko si-kwa ka malimeme sawkoa, maagi’i ko kwanimade.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: madalame kake ’ocyaini ki tawmo, maagi’i ko ’ongolimade.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa's tea, it's tasted good too.

ab: viva’ane ka takadrosa kiname ki takawngo do’o na kidrali.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: takawngo ka tyakanekane maagi’i na kidrali, ’iyakay na ka’ange ’iyakay na tawkoko ’iyakay na tangetange, la ’iyakay laana tawlolo.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: takawngo ka amalra ’angiyadraw na bwathi, tay si tangavane bwa’ay koa, wameca ’abee mya.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蔥給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: amwa kake nyane posao, ’awkay lami kake cengele mwane.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I'd see them next time.
